data.title: Almadex Minerals Ltd. updates on Paradise drilling and regional exploration on Sep. 18, 2025 in Vancouver.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC - On September 18, 2025, Almadex Minerals Ltd. (TSX-V: “DEX”) released an update on its exploration endeavors. The Company, based in British Columbia, reported on recent and upcoming exploration activities.

data.title: Brokerage Briggs Freeman Sotheby's Intl Realty to sell 8 Texas ranches from $11M to $60M, totaling multimillion dollar deals.
data.description: In Dallas on September 18, 2025, the prominent luxury brokerage Briggs Freeman Sotheby's International Realty revealed the sale of eight exclusive ranch properties in North Texas, with prices ranging from $11 million to $60 million. These elite properties showcase the opulence and grandeur of Texas ranch living, all commanding eight-figure price tags.

data.title: The Weinbach Group secures a $14 billion contract for VA projects in South Florida. Exciting news for the firm!
data.description: On September 18, 2025, in Miami, The Weinbach Group revealed their involvement in advertising, public relations, and marketing communication initiatives for the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (VA). This selection places them in a specialized group of companies working on projects for the VA.

data.title: Dr. John C. Moorhead, MD, MS, FACEP awarded ABMS 2025 Distinguished Service Award in Chicago on Sept. 18. (numbers: 2025, 1 recipient)
data.description: In Chicago on September 18, 2025, the American Board of Medical Specialties (ABMS) honored John C. Moorhead with its prestigious 2025 Distinguished Service Award. ABMS, a prominent nonprofit entity responsible for certifying physicians and medical specialists in the U.S., recognized Moorhead for his exceptional contributions to the field.

data.title: KSE partners with UMB Bank for 4-year deal, unveiling UMB Reserve at Ball Arena for 2025-26 Nuggets season.
data.description: Kroenke Sports & Entertainment (KSE) has recently revealed a significant development for the 2025-26 season at Ball Arena in Denver. A new partnership has been established with UMB Bank, with plans to introduce the UMB Reserve. The partnership is set to last for four years, highlighting the services offered by the financial institution in the retail and commercial banking sectors. This initiative signifies a major collaboration, bringing attention to UMB Bank's offerings to a broad audience at Ball Arena during the upcoming season.
GERMANY’S MERZ: FOR GERMANY, RECOGNITION OF PALESTINIAN STATEHOOD IS NOT UP FOR DEBATE TODAY

data.title: CCHC advises LA families to prioritize vaccines and wellness for back-to-school. Promotes healthy routines amidst Childhood Obesity Awareness Month.
data.description: CCHC is encouraging Los Angeles families to utilize the back-to-school season by ensuring children have updated school-required and recommended vaccinations, scheduling physical exams, and fostering healthy habits. Furthermore, during Childhood Obesity Awareness Month, CCHC is emphasizing the importance of promoting a healthy lifestyle. This initiative aims to address the rising concern of childhood obesity, especially among school-aged children. It serves as a reminder for parents to prioritize their children's health and well-being by adhering to vaccination schedules, attending physical exams, and encouraging nutritious practices. By taking proactive steps during this period, families can contribute to the overall well-being of their children and instill long-lasting healthy behaviors.
Pentagon: US State Dept Clears $780M Sale Of Javelin Missile Systems To Poland

data.title: CUPE demands action for child care workforce crisis, delivers petitions to gov't. Thousands call for strategy.
data.description: In Ottawa, the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) advocated for a national child care workforce strategy at Parliament Hill. CUPE's National Secretary-Treasurer, Candace Rennick, along with members of the National Child Care Working Group, presented numerous petitions to Patty Hajdu, Minister of Jobs and Families, and Anna Gainey, Secretary of State for Children and Youth. The petitions, signed by thousands of child care workers and supporters, urged for the implementation of a comprehensive national plan.

data.title: Kikoff Marketplace expands into auto loans for subprime credit, helping consumers access financial products.
data.description: A new platform called Kikoff Marketplace has been unveiled in San Francisco to cater to consumers with subprime credit scores. This initiative aims to bridge the gap between these individuals and financial products. Kikoff, the company behind this launch, intends to provide access to essential services for those struggling with low credit ratings. With this innovative Marketplace, consumers with subprime credit scores now have the opportunity to explore various financial products and services to improve their financial health.

data.title: The Sandbox launches Alpha Season 6 with Cirque du Soleil, aiming to bring in new users through innovative experiences.
data.description: In Los Angeles, a press release was issued regarding the launch of The Sandbox Alpha Season 6. The announcement highlights an upcoming release of the popular UGC platform, with specific details about the new season. This development is expected to draw significant attention, as previous seasons have garnered a considerable following. The press release signifies a major step forward for the platform, reflecting its ongoing growth and appeal to users.

data.title: Cairns Health expands Luna digital care reach to UCF's Legacy Pointe, enhancing healthcare access nationwide.
data.description: A healthcare tech company called Cairns Health has expanded the commercial launch of its AI-enabled conversational companion and remote monitoring solution, Luna. The latest addition to Luna’s reach is Legacy Pointe at the University of Central Florida (UCF). Recognized for its focus on lifelong learning and wellness, Legacy Pointe at UCF is a progressive senior living community. Cairns Health's partnership with Legacy Pointe will introduce Luna's innovative technology to its residents.

data.title: Beach Adventure Park opening in North Port Sept. 20, offering inflatable park with safe family fun in indoor setting.
data.description: In North Port, Florida, a new indoor attraction, the North Port Do the Beach Adventure Park, is set to open on September 20th. This park offers safe and active family fun for the people of North Port and Sarasota County. The fully themed inflatable park is designed for active fun, birthdays, and group events, providing a year-round "beach day" experience in a climate-controlled environment. The park aims to deliver a unique setting, inviting everyone to enjoy this new option for entertainment.

data.title: Sun Life U.S. and DentaQuest name 2025 Health Access Hero Award recipients, grants to nonprofits & individuals.
data.description: WELLESLEY, Mass., Sept. 18, 2025 - Sun Life U.S., along with DentaQuest, revealed the 2025 Health Access Hero Awards winners. These awards honor nonprofit organizations and individuals dedicated to improving health access. The grant support and accolades celebrate their impactful contributions.

data.title: Soccer sponsorship report: Mitsui Fudosan leads with 11 deals. Construction & Real Estate sector explored.
data.description: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently released the "Sponsorship Sector Report - Construction & Real Estate 2025," which offers insights into the global construction and real estate sector. The report covers key brands operating in this sector and evaluates trends within the sports sponsorship industry in recent years. Among various industries within construction and real estate, soccer emerges as the leading choice for annual sponsorship deals. This comprehensive report is now available for those interested in understanding the dynamics of the construction and real estate sector's involvement in sports sponsorships.

data.title: InterGroup Corp (NASDAQ: INTG) regains compliance with Nasdaq Rule 5550(b)(2).
data.description: Los Angeles, California - On September 18, 2025, The InterGroup Corporation (NASDAQ: INTG) disclosed that it received a communication from The Nasdaq Stock Market, LLC, confirming the Company's return to compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(2), commonly known as the "Market Value of Listed Securities Rule." This development signifies a positive shift for the company and demonstrates its adherence to the regulatory standards set by Nasdaq.
